scripts.build: yarn workspaces foreach --all --parallel --topological --exclude sauerteig run build
scripts.clean: yarn workspaces foreach --all --parallel --exclude sauerteig run clean
scripts.dist: yarn workspaces foreach --all --parallel --exclude sauerteig run dist
scripts.fix: yarn workspaces foreach --all --parallel --exclude sauerteig run fix
scripts.lint: yarn workspaces foreach --all --parallel --exclude sauerteig run lint
scripts.test: yarn workspaces foreach --all --parallel --exclude sauerteig run test
